sentences.en: Stadiums are among the oldest forms of urban architecture: vast stadiums where the public could watch sporting events were at the centre of western city life as far back as the ancient Greek and Roman Empires, well before the construction of the great medieval cathedrals and the grand 19th- and 20th-century railway stations which dominated urban skylines in later eras.
sentences.zh: 体育场是最古老的城市建筑形式之一：早在古希腊和古罗马帝国时期，大型体育场就是西方城市生活的中心，人们可以在那里观看体育赛事；这远早于中世纪大教堂以及后来主导城市天际线的19、20世纪宏伟火车站的建造。

grammar.type: 冒号解释 + 多层定语从句
grammar.note: 冒号后解释 stadiums 的历史地位；where 引导定语从句修饰 stadiums；well before 引出时间对比；which 修饰 railway stations。

sentences.en: Today, however, stadiums are regarded with growing scepticism.
sentences.zh: 然而，如今人们对体育场抱有越来越多的怀疑。

grammar.type: 被动语态
grammar.note: are regarded with... 表“被以某种态度看待”；however 标志古今态度转折。

sentences.en: Construction costs can soar above £1 billion, and stadiums finished for major events such as the Olympic Games or the FIFA World Cup have notably fallen into disuse and disrepair.
sentences.zh: 建设成本可能飙升到10亿英镑以上，而为奥运会或世界杯等大型赛事完工的体育场，明显已经陷入闲置和失修。

grammar.type: 并列句 + 过去分词定语
grammar.note: costs can soar 与 stadiums have fallen 并列；finished for... 修饰 stadiums。

sentences.en: But this need not be the case.
sentences.zh: 但情况并非必须如此。

grammar.type: 情态否定
grammar.note: need not 表“不必”；this 指前文体育场荒废的局面。

sentences.en: History shows that stadiums can drive urban development and adapt to the culture of every age.
sentences.zh: 历史表明，体育场能够推动城市发展，并适应每个时代的文化。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 并列谓语
grammar.note: shows 后接 that 从句；drive 与 adapt to 并列。

sentences.en: Even today, architects and planners are finding new ways to adapt the mono-functional sports arenas which became emblematic of modernisation during the 20th century.
sentences.zh: 即使在今天，建筑师和规划者也在寻找新方法，改造那些在20世纪现代化过程中具有象征意义的单一功能体育场馆。

grammar.type: 定语从句
grammar.note: which became... 修饰 sports arenas；adapt 在本句指“改造以适应新用途”。

sentences.en: The amphitheatre of Arles in southwest France, with a capacity of 25,000 spectators, is perhaps the best example of just how versatile stadiums can be.
sentences.zh: 法国西南部阿尔勒圆形剧场可容纳2.5万名观众，也许是体育场多功能性的最佳例子。

grammar.type: 插入介词短语 + 宾语从句式感叹
grammar.note: with a capacity... 补充容量；just how versatile... 作 of 的宾语内容。

sentences.en: Built by the Romans in 90 AD, it became a fortress with four towers after the fifth century, and was then transformed into a village containing more than 200 houses.
sentences.zh: 它由罗马人建于公元90年，5世纪之后变成一座带有四座塔楼的堡垒，随后又被改造成一个包含200多栋房屋的村庄。

grammar.type: 过去分词状语 + 被动语态
grammar.note: Built by... 作背景；became 与 was transformed 并列展现用途变化。

sentences.en: With the growing interest in conservation during the 19th century, it was converted back into an arena for the staging of bullfights, thereby returning the structure to its original use as a venue for public spectacles.
sentences.zh: 19世纪，随着人们对保护古迹的兴趣不断增长，它又被改回斗牛表演场，从而使该建筑恢复了最初作为公共观赏活动场所的用途。

grammar.type: with 复合背景 + 分词结果
grammar.note: With... 表时代背景；thereby returning... 表结果。

sentences.en: Another example is the imposing arena of Verona in northern Italy, with space for 30,000 spectators, which was built 60 years before the Arles amphitheatre and 40 years before Rome’s famous Colosseum.
sentences.zh: 另一个例子是意大利北部维罗纳宏伟的竞技场，可容纳3万名观众；它比阿尔勒圆形剧场早建60年，比罗马著名的斗兽场早建40年。

grammar.type: 非限制性定语从句
grammar.note: with space... 补充容量；which was built... 补充建造年代比较。

sentences.en: It has endured the centuries and is currently considered one of the world’s prime sites for opera, thanks to its outstanding acoustics.
sentences.zh: 它经受住了几个世纪的考验，如今因杰出的声学效果而被认为是世界顶级歌剧场地之一。

grammar.type: 现在完成时 + 被动语态
grammar.note: has endured 表延续至今；is considered... thanks to... 表评价原因。

sentences.en: The area in the centre of the Italian town of Lucca, known as the Piazza dell’Anfiteatro, is yet another impressive example of an amphitheatre becoming absorbed into the fabric of the city.
sentences.zh: 意大利卢卡市中心的区域，即 Piazza dell’Anfiteatro，是另一个令人印象深刻的例子，显示圆形剧场如何融入城市肌理。

grammar.type: 同位语 + 动名词结构
grammar.note: known as... 作后置说明；becoming absorbed... 作 of 的宾语。

sentences.en: The site evolved in a similar way to Arles and was progressively filled with buildings from the Middle Ages until the 19th century, variously used as houses, a salt depot and a prison.
sentences.zh: 这个地点以类似阿尔勒的方式演变，从中世纪到19世纪逐渐被建筑填满，曾分别用作住宅、盐仓和监狱。

grammar.type: 被动语态 + 分词补充
grammar.note: was filled with... 为被动；variously used as... 补充不同用途。

sentences.en: But rather than reverting to an arena, it became a market square, designed by Romanticist architect Lorenzo Nottolini.
sentences.zh: 但它没有恢复为竞技场，而是成为由浪漫主义建筑师 Lorenzo Nottolini 设计的市场广场。

grammar.type: rather than 对比
grammar.note: rather than reverting... 与 became... 对比；designed by... 修饰 market square。

sentences.en: Today, the ruins of the amphitheatre remain embedded in the various shops and residences surrounding the public square.
sentences.zh: 今天，圆形剧场遗迹仍嵌在围绕公共广场的各种商店和住宅之中。

grammar.type: remain + 过去分词
grammar.note: remain embedded 表持续状态；surrounding... 修饰 shops and residences。

sentences.en: There are many similarities between modern stadiums and the ancient amphitheatres intended for games.
sentences.zh: 现代体育场与古代用于竞技的圆形剧场有许多相似之处。

grammar.type: There be 句型
grammar.note: There are... between A and B 表两者之间存在相似点。

sentences.en: But some of the flexibility was lost at the beginning of the 20th century, as stadiums were developed using new products such as steel and reinforced concrete, and made use of bright lights for night-time matches.
sentences.zh: 但在20世纪初，随着体育场开始使用钢材和钢筋混凝土等新材料，并利用强光进行夜间比赛，一部分灵活性丧失了。

grammar.type: 被动语态 + as 原因/时间从句
grammar.note: was lost 为被动；as 引导发展背景；made use of 表“利用”。

sentences.en: Many such stadiums are situated in suburban areas, designed for sporting use only and surrounded by parking lots.
sentences.zh: 许多这样的体育场位于郊区，只为体育用途而设计，并被停车场包围。

grammar.type: 过去分词并列
grammar.note: situated / designed / surrounded 三个过去分词结构描述现代体育场特征。

sentences.en: These factors mean that they may not be as accessible to the general public, require more energy to run and contribute to urban heat.
sentences.zh: 这些因素意味着它们可能不太方便普通公众到达，需要更多能源运行，并会加剧城市热效应。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 并列谓语
grammar.note: mean 后接 that 从句；may not be / require / contribute 并列。

sentences.en: But many of today’s most innovative architects see scope for the stadium to help improve the city.
sentences.zh: 但今天许多最具创新精神的建筑师看到了体育场帮助改善城市的空间。

grammar.type: see scope for
grammar.note: see scope for... 表“看到……的可能性”；to help improve... 修饰 stadium。

sentences.en: Among the current strategies, two seem to be having particular success: the stadium as an urban hub, and as a power plant.
sentences.zh: 在当前策略中，两种似乎特别成功：把体育场作为城市枢纽，以及把体育场作为发电厂。

grammar.type: 冒号列举
grammar.note: two seem to be... 为主干；冒号后列举两种策略。

sentences.en: There’s a growing trend for stadiums to be equipped with public spaces and services that serve a function beyond sport, such as hotels, retail outlets, conference centres, restaurants and bars, children’s playgrounds and green space.
sentences.zh: 越来越多的体育场配备了公共空间和服务，这些空间和服务承担体育之外的功能，例如酒店、零售店、会议中心、餐厅酒吧、儿童游乐场和绿地。

grammar.type: There be + 定语从句
grammar.note: There’s a growing trend for... 表趋势；that serve... 修饰 spaces and services；such as 列举。

sentences.en: Creating mixed-use developments such as this reinforces compactness and multi-functionality, making more efficient use of land and helping to regenerate urban spaces.
sentences.zh: 创建这种混合用途开发能增强紧凑性和多功能性，更高效地利用土地，并帮助再生城市空间。

grammar.type: 动名词主语 + 分词结果
grammar.note: Creating... 作主语；making 与 helping 为并列分词，说明结果。

sentences.en: This opens the space up to families and a wider cross-section of society, instead of catering only to sportspeople and supporters.
sentences.zh: 这使空间向家庭和更广泛的社会群体开放，而不是只服务运动员和支持者。

grammar.type: open up + instead of
grammar.note: opens...up 表开放；instead of catering only to... 表取代关系。

sentences.en: There have been many examples of this in the UK: the mixed-use facilities at Wembley and Old Trafford have become a blueprint for many other stadiums in the world.
sentences.zh: 英国已有许多这样的例子：温布利和老特拉福德的混合用途设施，已经成为世界许多其他体育场的蓝图。

grammar.type: There have been + 冒号解释
grammar.note: There have been 表已有例子；冒号后具体说明；blueprint 表可复制范本。

sentences.en: The phenomenon of stadiums as power stations has arisen from the idea that energy problems can be overcome by integrating interconnected buildings by means of a smart grid, which is an electricity supply network that uses digital communications technology to detect and react to local changes in usage, without significant energy losses.
sentences.zh: 体育场作为发电站的现象，源自这样一种想法：通过智能电网整合相互连接的建筑，可以克服能源问题；智能电网是一种利用数字通信技术探测并响应本地用电变化、且不会造成显著能源损失的供电网络。

grammar.type: 同位语从句 + 非限制性定语从句
grammar.note: that energy problems... 解释 idea；which is... 解释 smart grid；to detect and react... 表用途。

sentences.en: Stadiums are ideal for these purposes, because their canopies have a large surface area for fitting photovoltaic panels and rise high enough to make use of micro wind turbines.
sentences.zh: 体育场非常适合这些用途，因为其顶棚表面积大，适合安装光伏板，而且高度足够高，可以利用微型风力涡轮机。

grammar.type: because 原因状语从句
grammar.note: because 解释 ideal；for fitting... 与 to make use of... 分别说明表面积和高度优势。

sentences.en: Freiburg Mage Solar Stadium in Germany is the first of a new wave of stadiums as power plants, which also includes the Amsterdam Arena and the Kaohsiung Stadium.
sentences.zh: 德国弗赖堡太阳能体育场是新一代“体育场发电厂”的第一个，其中还包括阿姆斯特丹竞技场和高雄体育场。

grammar.type: 主系表 + 非限制性定语从句
grammar.note: is the first... 为主干；which also includes... 补充同类案例。

sentences.en: The latter, inaugurated in 2009, has 8,844 photovoltaic panels producing up to 1.14 GWh of electricity annually.
sentences.zh: 后者于2009年启用，拥有8844块光伏板，每年可生产高达1.14吉瓦时的电力。

grammar.type: 过去分词插入 + 分词补充
grammar.note: inaugurated in 2009 补充时间；producing... 说明电力产量。

sentences.en: This reduces the annual output of carbon dioxide by 660 tons and supplies up to 80 percent of the surrounding area when the stadium is not in use.
sentences.zh: 这使每年二氧化碳排放减少660吨，并在体育场未使用时为周边地区提供高达80%的电力。

grammar.type: 并列谓语
grammar.note: reduces 与 supplies 并列；when 引导时间条件。

sentences.en: This is proof that a stadium can serve its city, and have a decidedly positive impact in terms of reduction of CO2 emissions.
sentences.zh: 这证明体育场可以服务其所在城市，并在减少二氧化碳排放方面产生明显积极的影响。

grammar.type: 表语从句 + 并列谓语
grammar.note: This is proof that...；serve 与 have a positive impact 并列。

sentences.en: Sporting arenas have always been central to the life and culture of cities.
sentences.zh: 体育场馆一直是城市生活和文化的核心。

grammar.type: 现在完成时
grammar.note: have always been 强调从过去到现在持续成立的事实。

sentences.en: In every era, the stadium has acquired new value and uses: from military fortress to residential village, public space to theatre and most recently a field for experimentation in advanced engineering.
sentences.zh: 在每个时代，体育场都获得了新的价值和用途：从军事堡垒到居住村落，从公共空间到剧场，最近又成为先进工程实验的场地。

grammar.type: 冒号列举
grammar.note: has acquired 表逐步获得；冒号后用 from...to... 列举历史用途变化。

sentences.en: The stadium of today now brings together multiple functions, thus helping cities to create a sustainable future.
sentences.zh: 今天的体育场把多种功能结合在一起，从而帮助城市创造可持续的未来。

grammar.type: 分词结果状语
grammar.note: brings together 为主干；thus helping... 表结果。

questions.title: Questions 14-17 · Matching information
instructions: Reading Passage 2 has seven sections, A-G.
Which section contains the following information?

items.prompt: a mention of negative attitudes towards stadium building projects
figures demonstrating the environmental benefits of a certain stadium
examples of the wide range of facilities available at some new stadiums
reference to the disadvantages of the stadiums built during a certain era

questions.title: Questions 18-22 · Summary completion
instructions: Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.

items.prompt: The amphitheatre of Arles was converted first into a ___.
It finally became an arena where spectators could watch ___.
The arena in Verona is famous today as a venue where ___ is performed.
Lucca’s amphitheatre was used for the storage of ___.
It is now a market square with ___ and homes incorporated into the remains.
Negative feature of twentieth-century stadiums mentioned in Section D.
Negative feature of twentieth-century stadiums mentioned in Section D.
Advantage of modern stadium design mentioned by the writer.
Advantage of modern stadium design mentioned by the writer.

phrases.w: be absorbed into the fabric of the city
